name: Byrna Technologies Inc.
business: Byrna Technologies Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells less-lethal personal security devices, including CO2-powered launchers, projectiles, and accessories. Its products are sold to consumers for self-defense and to law enforcement and private security professionals as alternatives to lethal force. The company also offers a line of chemical irritant sprays and ballistic-rated backpacks.

exposures.sentence: We are also focused on providing law enforcement and private security customers with less lethal alternatives to firearms that are intended to reduce the use of lethal force and facilitate trust within the communities they serve.
In the consumer market, our solutions are designed to provide ordinary civilians with an effective, less-lethal tool to disable, disarm and deter would-be assailants and to escape harm s way.

We sell our products into the consumer market through the Byrna e commerce store, the Side Hustle dealer program, premier dealers, Amazon, and a network of more than 1,300 local, regional, and national outdoor and sporting goods retailers, either directly or through distributors.

We also deployed a proprietary AI assisted advertising system designed to automate creative generation, audience targeting, content iteration, and bid optimization, resulting in improved marketing efficiency and reduced customer acquisition costs.

In addition to launcher and projectile development, we have initiated R&D programs targeting next generation system capabilities... our ongoing R&D strategy includes investments in AI enabled training, simulation, and system optimization concepts, as well as smart projectile technologies intended to potentially enhance accuracy, expand platform compatibility, and support future product differentiation.

catalysts.event: Commercial launch of Byrna CL (Compact Launcher)
catalysts.sentence: launched the Byrna CL (Compact Launcher) in April 2025

catalysts.event: Acquisition of two Federal Firearms Licenses
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, the Company acquired two Federal Firearms Licenses, each effective June 1, 2025 and expiring July 1, 2028.
